targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) as value
FROM groups
WHERE last_scraped_at >= (SELECT started_at FROM scrape_runs WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM scrape_runs))

SELECT COUNT(*) as value
FROM groups
WHERE pro_network = ANY(
  SELECT unnest(string_to_array(networks, ','))
  FROM scrape_runs
  WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM scrape_runs)
)

WITH run AS (
  SELECT started_at, networks FROM scrape_runs WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM scrape_runs)
),
total AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM groups
  WHERE pro_network = ANY(
    SELECT unnest(string_to_array(networks, ',')) FROM run
  )
),
done AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM groups
  WHERE last_scraped_at >= (SELECT started_at FROM run)
)
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * done.n / NULLIF(total.n, 0), 1) as value
FROM done, total

WITH run AS (
  SELECT started_at, networks FROM scrape_runs WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM scrape_runs)
),
rate AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(last_scraped_at) - MIN(last_scraped_at))), 0) as groups_per_sec
  FROM groups
  WHERE last_scraped_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
  AND last_scraped_at >= (SELECT started_at FROM run)
),
remaining AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) as n
  FROM groups
  WHERE pro_network = ANY(
    SELECT unnest(string_to_array(networks, ',')) FROM run
  )
  AND last_scraped_at < (SELECT started_at FROM run)
)
SELECT ROUND(remaining.n / NULLIF(rate.groups_per_sec, 0)) as value
FROM rate, remaining

SELECT ROUND(COUNT(*) / 30.0, 1) as value
FROM groups
WHERE last_scraped_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
AND last_scraped_at >= (SELECT started_at FROM scrape_runs WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM scrape_runs))

SELECT
  date_trunc('minute', last_scraped_at) as time,
  COUNT(*) as "groups/min"
FROM groups
WHERE last_scraped_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
AND last_scraped_at >= (SELECT started_at FROM scrape_runs WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM scrape_runs))
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  date_trunc('minute', last_scraped_at) as time,
  COUNT(*) OVER (ORDER BY date_trunc('minute', last_scraped_at)) as "cumulative scraped"
FROM (
  SELECT date_trunc('minute', last_scraped_at) as last_scraped_at
  FROM groups
  WHERE last_scraped_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND last_scraped_at >= (SELECT started_at FROM scrape_runs WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM scrape_runs))
  GROUP BY 1
) t
ORDER BY 1

WITH run AS (
  SELECT started_at, networks FROM scrape_runs WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM scrape_runs)
)
SELECT
  'Scraped' as label, COUNT(*) as value
FROM groups
WHERE last_scraped_at >= (SELECT started_at FROM run)
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'Remaining' as label, COUNT(*) as value
FROM groups
WHERE pro_network = ANY(
  SELECT unnest(string_to_array(networks, ',')) FROM run
)
AND last_scraped_at < (SELECT started_at FROM run)

SELECT
  id as "Run ID",
  started_at as "Started At",
  status as "Status"
FROM scrape_runs
WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM scrape_runs)

SELECT pro_network, COUNT(*) as count
FROM groups
WHERE pro_network IS NOT NULL
AND pro_network != ''
GROUP BY pro_network
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
  id as group_id,
  name,
  pro_network as network,
  city,
  country,
  member_count as members,
  last_scraped_at as scraped_at
FROM groups
WHERE last_scraped_at >= (SELECT started_at FROM scrape_runs WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM scrape_runs))
ORDER BY last_scraped_at DESC
LIMIT 50
